resources.string: Read number of media on glasses
Status: Battery optimization is ON for CyanBridge
Status: Battery optimization is OFF for CyanBridge

Some midrange/low-end phones may disconnect Bluetooth devices when CyanBridge is in the background or when you close the app. To keep your glasses connected, disable battery optimization for CyanBridge.
Open Recents, find CyanBridge, then use the app menu (often a long-press or tap the app icon) and choose Lock/Pin/Keep open. This prevents the system from clearing the app.
Battery optimization still appears to be ON. Please disable it, then tap "I Locked It" again.
Battery optimization settings are not available on this Android version.
Could not open settings on this device.
Let\'s get you set up with your smart glasses. We need to configure a few things to ensure a stable connection.
Android often closes apps running in the background to save RAM. To avoid disconnections, please \"Lock\" CyanBridge in your Recents menu.

1. Swipe up from the bottom (or tap the Square button) to see recent apps.
2. Find CyanBridge.
3. Tap the icon at the top or long-press the preview.
4. Select "Lock this app" or the Lock icon.
Enables on-device automation primitives (read screen text, click, scroll, back/home) for the local agent.
Get a daily notification to review facts about your day, creating a personal diary.

Each evening, you\'ll receive a notification asking you to confirm facts about your day. This creates an automatic diary that helps the AI remember important events, people, and experiences. The more you use it, the more personalized your AI assistant becomes.
Like Windows Recall - automatically capture and remember what\'s on your screen.

The app can periodically capture text from your screen to help the AI assist you better. You can blacklist sensitive apps like banking apps, password managers, and messaging apps. All captures are stored locally on your device.
Automatically record audio from your glasses for transcription and daily summaries.

When enabled, the app records audio from your glasses in 15-minute chunks, then transcribes it for automatic diary/summary generation. You can review and delete recordings at any time. All audio stays on your device.
Customize how the AI assistant behaves and what it knows about you.

You can customize the agent\'s personality (how it talks, its tone) and provide facts about yourself (your job, hobbies, family, preferences). This makes the AI more personal and helpful. You can edit these anytime in Settings.
Your Data Stays on Your Device
All your data is encrypted and stored locally on your phone.

Your chats, screen captures, recordings, and AI memories are encrypted using industry-standard encryption and stored only on your device. Future cloud sync options will be available with a Pro Subscription, allowing you to securely sync across devices. Cloud options are currently greyed out until you activate Pro.
Optional cloud features for power users.

You can use the ENTIRE app completely FREE with local models running on your phone (Qwen 2.5 1.7B, Whisper for transcription, etc.). No internet required!

Pro Subscription is ONLY needed for:
• Cloud AI models (API costs money)
• Cloud memory sync across devices

🔒 STEALTH MODE FIRMWARE (coming soon)
The upcoming Stealth Mode enables silent capture of audio, photos, and videos from your glasses. This requires a one-time payment of the Standard or Max Pro plan for the modded firmware flash. You can cancel your subscription afterward and keep Stealth Mode indefinitely!

🎁 FREE TRIAL
New users get a free 1-month Pro trial (rate-limited among all free trial users). Cancel anytime.
No synced photos or videos found yet.
Unable to open this media item.
